---
title: "Blog"
output: html_document
---

# Blog

Short, decision‑focused notes on multi‑omics interpretation:
- Common pitfalls in cross‑omics integration
- Patterns in go / no‑go decisions
- Translational framing for grants, publications, and partner decks

<div class="note">
  New here? Start with <a href="../services.html">Services</a> or <a href="../index.html">Home</a>.
</div>

## Latest posts

```{r, echo=FALSE}
# List all rendered posts in /blog (newest first)
posts <- list.files(pattern = "*.html")
posts <- posts[posts != "index.html"]
info <- file.info(posts)
posts <- posts[order(info$mtime, decreasing = TRUE)]
if (length(posts) == 0) {
  cat("- (No posts yet — check back soon.)
")
} else {
  cat(paste0("- <a href="", posts, "">", sub(".html$", "", posts), "</a>
"))
}
```
